query: Could you help me create a travel plan for 3 days that starts from Houston to Wichita from March 19th to March 21st, 2022? We're a group of 3 people with a budget of $2,700. Smoking is a necessity for us, so accommodating this into our hotel arrangements would be beneficial.

plan.transportation: Flight F3923931, from Houston to Wichita
plan.attraction: Old Cowtown Museum;The Keeper of the Plains;Wichita Art Museum;
plan.accommodation: Stunning duplex. EXCELLENT location. Fort Greene!!, Wichita

plan.attraction: Kansas Aviation Museum;Sedgwick County Zoo;Botanica, The Wichita Gardens;
